Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Authorizes the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax
Summary: Permits the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax; provides for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to the imposition of a hotel and motel tax in the town of Minisink; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
